The Creator (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $40,774,679Details
International Box Office $63,497,457
Worldwide Box Office $104,272,136
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,074,492
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,089,426
Total $3,163,918
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Amidst a future war between the human race and the forces of artificial intelligence, Joshua, a hardened ex-special forces agent grieving the disappearance of his wife, is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI who has developed a mysterious weapon with the power to end the war… and mankind itself. Joshua and his team of elite operatives journey across enemy lines, into the dark heart of AI-occupied territory only to discover the world-ending weapon he's been instructed to destroy is an AI in the form of a young child.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$14,079,512 (34.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$80,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,680 opening theaters/3,680 max. theaters, 4.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $44,576,343

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 29th, 2023 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
September 29th, 2023 (IMAX) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: September 27th, 2023 (Wide) (Belgium)
September 27th, 2023 (Wide) (Indonesia)
September 27th, 2023 (Wide) (France)
September 27th, 2023 (Wide) (Switzerland)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide) (Austria)
Video Release: November 14th, 2023 by 20th Century Studios
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, some bloody images and strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2783 (cert #54441), 5/17/2023)
Running Time: 133 minutes
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA, Tokyo, Japan
Filming location (country): Cambodia, England, Indonesia, Japan, Nepal, Thailand, United Kingdom, United States
Filming location (production facility): Pinewood Studios, Buckinghamshire, England
Filming location (state or county): Buckinghamshire England, California, United States
Plot point: Artificial Intelligence
Social setting: Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Action Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Regency, Regency Enterprises, Entertainment One, Bad Dreams
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Amidst a future war between the human race and the forces of artificial intelligence, Joshua, a hardened ex-special forces agent grieving the disappearance of his wife, is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI who has developed a mysterious weapon with the power to end the war… and mankind itself. Joshua and his team of elite operatives journey across enemy lines, into the dark heart of AI-occupied territory only to discover the world-ending weapon he's been instructed to destroy is an AI in the form of a young child.
